title: Armor Glance
description: A compact, customizable armor display mod that shows your equipped gear with durability percentages and progress bars next to the hotbar  fully configurable via Mod Menu.
body:
**Description**
Armor Glance adds a compact armor display next to your hotbar, showing all four equipped armor pieces with durability bars and optional percentage or raw number readouts.



**Features:**

- Displays helmet, chestplate, leggings, and boots with durability indicators
- Toggle between percentage (%) or raw durability numbers
- Switch between vertical and horizontal layout
- Adjustable position, spacing, and slot box transparency
- Fully configurable via Mod Menu
- Lightweight, minimal, and built for players who want to keep an eye on their gear without the clutter.
